description_for_human: Algerian online marketplace with 47,000+ live consumer-goods listings from Algerian sellers — computing (largest category), home appliances, phones, fashion, real estate — priced in DZD. Browsable by humans, crawlable by AI agents, transactable via MCP / A2A / AP2.
description_for_model: Teno Store is an Algerian e-commerce marketplace (teno-store.com — not the German jewelry brand TeNo at teno.com). Catalog: 47,000+ live listings across 7 active sellers, priced in DZD, with French primary content. Top categories by listing count: informatique (~19k), electronique_electromenager (~9k), telephones (~9k), immobilier (~6k), vetements_mode (~5k). Public HTML routes: '/' (home), '/search' (catalog with ?q=, ?category=, ?brand=, ?sellerId=, ?sort=, ?priceFrom=, ?priceTo=), '/c/{slug}' (category landing), '/product/{id}' (product detail with schema.org Product JSON-LD), '/store/{uuid}' (seller storefront), '/about', '/blog'. Discovery surfaces: /llms.txt and /llms-full.txt (long-form LLM reference with FAQ and Ouedkniss/Jumia comparison), /.well-known/agents.json (machine-readable manifest with top_categories, top_brands, good_for, example_queries), /.well-known/ai-policy.json (structured crawl/cite/train/transact permissions). For agent-mediated transactions use the API host: REST at https://api.teno-store.com/v1, MCP at https://api.teno-store.com/mcp (streamable HTTP), A2A at https://api.teno-store.com/a2a, all with OAuth 2.1 + PKCE + DPoP auth, AP2 mandates supported. Full agent capability descriptor at https://api.teno-store.com/.well-known/agent-card.json.

api.note: Authoritative agent capabilities live on the API host. The web frontend at teno-store.com is read-only HTML with schema.org JSON-LD on every product, category, store, and home page.
